subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablih-Husayn! The Sovereign of Days hath appeared, and the Lord of Manifestations is established upon the Throne of Revelation with signs and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل حسین سلطان ایام ظاهر و مالک ظهورات بر عرش ظهور مستوی و بایات و
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @thankfulness; gratitude
